title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: Current blocker is structural, not credential-only: the fix landed in `workspace-preflight`, but the failing path is `implement`’s own checkout step, which still uses the old single `Checkout target repository` flow and can hit auth failure. Highest-risk false assumption to avoid in the next patch: **“all checkout blocks are equivalent, so fixing one checkout stanza fixes production.”** In this workflow, similarly named checkout steps exist in different jobs; only the `implement` job path matters for this blocker, and it must be patched directly.
